content: Models with confirmed support for {{productName}} features and actions

comment.text: Tooltip for a help button in the AI settings provider dialog, describing models that support specific product features. The {{productName}} variable represents the brand name.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.sectionHeader}>
 <Text className={styles.sectionTitle}>
 {t("AISettings:RecommendedModels")}
 </Text>
 <HelpButton
 tooltipContent={t("AISettings:RecommendedModelsTooltip", {
 productName: getBrandName("ProductName"),
 })}
 place="bottom"
 size={12}
 />
